title: stelis perennis
intro: Stelis perennis, also known as the Perennial Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central America and the Caribbean. This orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis perennis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Stelis perennis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
